case_title: LILY LIU VS. BRAVO LAW OFFICE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LIU, LILY AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO LAW OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE: JOE BRAVO) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, LILY AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO LAW OFFICE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF LILY LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRAVO LAW OFFICE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE COURT THAT PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND SHE HAS ALREADY RECEIVED THE FUNDS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, LILY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO DATE OF DELIVERY** SERVED APR-06-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO LAW OFFICE
